title: Release gate blocked: pre-existing lint error in src/app/page.tsx prevents merge of formatMoney
description: The formatMoney deliverable (ADR 0004) is complete, fully tested (42/42), typecheck-clean, and lint-clean on its own three changed files. However, the release rule requires build + lint + tests ALL green on the post-merge state. Full-repo `eslint .` fails with 1 error in src/app/page.tsx (@next/next/no-html-link-for-pages — an <a href="/"> that should be next/link <Link>). This error is PRE-EXISTING and unrelated to the ledger change (page.tsx last touched by commit d5f670c). Per policy I did NOT merge. Decision needed: how to unblock the merge.

title: formatMoney committed (12bc223) — merge/release gate blocked on pre-existing page.tsx lint error
description: The architect's ADR 0004 formatMoney deliverable is verified and committed to main as 12bc223 (unpushed; review_each_pr means merge is a human gate). Full suite 42/42 pass, tsc clean, the three changed files lint clean. However the release rule requires build+lint+tests ALL green: `eslint .` fails with 1 error in src/app/page.tsx (@next/next/no-html-link-for-pages — an <a href="/"> that should be next/link <Link>). This error is PRE-EXISTING and unrelated (page.tsx last touched by commit d5f670c, brand assets) and lies OUTSIDE the formatMoney work order's scope, so per the 'never modify files outside the accepted item' constraint I did not auto-fix it. Decision needed to unblock the all-green gate.

title: Release v0.5.0 HELD — fix red lint in src/app/page.tsx, then tag
description: The v0.5.0 release (MINOR: formatMoney, ADR 0004) is prepared but held because the full quality gate fails on lint at HEAD 12bc223. typecheck/tests(42)/build are all green; eslint reports 1 error: src/app/page.tsx:9 uses a raw instead of next/link (@next/next/no-html-link-for-pages). This is pre-existing trunk debt introduced in 885afae (v0.4.0), unrelated to the new increment, but as the last quality gate I do not tag over a red trunk. Fix: add `import Link from "next/link"`, change line 9 to and line 26 to (only the /-route anchor trips the rule). Once eslint is clean, the prepared release executes: bump 0.4.0->0.5.0, prepend CHANGELOG Added entry for formatMoney, draft release notes, fold in the uncommitted README tweak, commit, tag, push, publish.

title: Docs sync for formatMoney — review CHANGELOG [Unreleased] + README edits before they fold into v0.5.0
description: Documented the formatMoney feature (12bc223, ADR 0004) by prepending a CHANGELOG entry under the existing [Unreleased] section and adding 'display formatting' to the README ledger/lib structure line. I deliberately used [Unreleased] rather than a [0.5.0] heading because the Release Manager HELD v0.5.0 (red lint trunk in src/app/page.tsx:9). The edits are doc-only (verified via git diff --stat: only CHANGELOG.md + README.md), uncommitted in the working tree. They should fold into the eventual v0.5.0 release commit once the lint blocker is fixed.
